stemHtml: You are trying to get a bearing on an NDB in the HF frequency range. In theory, how can you best receive a strong enough signal?

options.a: Climb to increase your chance of capturing the sky wave.
options.b: Climb to increase your chance of capturing the ground wave.
options.c: Increase your distance from the NDB to better capture the ground wave.
options.d: Fly towards the NDB to better capture the sky wave.
